components.value: V, S, M (a tiny piece of matter of the same sort of item you plan to create with minor creation )

description.value: You create a non-magical, unattended object of nonliving vegetable matter. The volume of the item created cannot exceed 1 cubic foot per caster level. You must succeed on an appropriate Craft skill check to make a complex item. Attempting to use any created object as a material component causes the spell to fail.
